title: T-023 — P2 stubs: anomaly + maintenance trigger DSL rules + tables + placeholder shells (OEE §7.2-7.3, §9.3, §15.6)
prompt:
# T-023 — P2 stubs scaffold

PRD: docs/prd/15-OEE-PRD.md §7.2 (`oee_anomaly_detector_v1` P2 stub), §7.3 (`oee_maintenance_trigger_v1` P2 stub), §9.3 (P2 tables oee_anomalies + oee_ewma_state + oee_maintenance_triggers), §15.2 P2 screens, §15.6 placeholder shell
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototypes: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/screens.jsx:902-948 (p2_placeholder_shell), :950-995 (oee_anomaly_detection_page), :997-1036 (oee_equipment_health_page), :379-469 (oee_downtime_pareto_page), :1038-1080 (oee_tv_dashboard_page)

## Goal
Ship the P2 scaffold for OEE-c sub-module so 15-c can be fleshed out in a later wave without re-bootstrapping: (1) P2 tables per §9.3 — `oee_anomalies`, `oee_ewma_state`, `oee_maintenance_triggers`; (2) two rules registered in rule_definitions as `active=FALSE` P2 stubs; (3) generic `<P2Placeholder>` (ComingSoonPage) component + four P2 routes wired (anomalies, equipment-health, pareto, tv) gated by feature flags.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration `packages/db/migrations/NNNN_oee_c_p2_tables.sql` per §9.3 verbatim DDL: `oee_anomalies`, `oee_ewma_state`, `oee_maintenance_triggers` with org_id + R13 audit + RLS via app.current_org_id() (per Wave1 T-125). Map PRD's `tenant_id` to `org_id` per Wave0 v4.3.
2. Migration step: INSERT into rule_definitions for `oee_anomaly_detector_v1` (phase='P2', active=FALSE) and `oee_maintenance_trigger_v1` (phase='P2', active=FALSE). Idempotent ON CONFLICT.
3. Shared `apps/web/app/(oee)/_components/coming-soon-page.tsx` (per translation note p2_placeholder_shell): props {title, description, featureFlag, alternativeLink}.
4. Four P2 routes:
   - `/oee/anomalies/page.tsx` → renders `oee_anomaly_detection_page` shape (translation note matches lines 950-995) wrapped in feature-flag check `oee.anomaly_detection_enabled` (read from 02-SETTINGS feature_flags). When flag is false, renders <P2Placeholder> with cross-link to /oee/summary.
   - `/oee/equipment-health/page.tsx` → feature-flag `oee.equipment_health_enabled` + 13-MAINTENANCE module check; placeholder when off.
   - `/oee/pareto/page.tsx` → P2 page; P1 interim home is OEE-003.T2 (per §15.5) so this route renders <P2Placeholder> with cross-link `Go to Six Big Losses tab → /oee/summary?tab=losses`.
   - `/oee/tv/[line_id]/page.tsx` → feature-flag `oee.tv_dashboard_enabled`; placeholder when off (BL-OEE-06 OS kiosk decision tracked).
5. RTL test snapshot + parity check against placeholder shell prototype + flag-on/off branching.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/NNNN_oee_c_p2_tables.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/oee/{anomalies,ewma-state,maintenance-triggers}.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/_components/coming-soon-page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/anomalies/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/equipment-health/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/pareto/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/tv/[line_id]/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/_components/__tests__/coming-soon-page.test.tsx [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/oee-c-p2-tables.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration runs, when `\d oee_anomalies`, `\d oee_ewma_state`, `\d oee_maintenance_triggers` are read, then the §9.3 column shape + org_id NOT NULL + RLS+FORCE RLS via app.current_org_id() are present; and rule_definitions has both rules registered with active=FALSE phase=P2.
2. Given /oee/anomalies is requested with `oee.anomaly_detection_enabled=false`, when page renders, then <P2Placeholder> is shown with cross-link; with the flag true, the production oee_anomaly_detection_page shape renders per prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/screens.jsx:950-995.
3. Given /oee/pareto is requested, when page renders, then <P2Placeholder> is shown with cross-link `Go to Six Big Losses tab → /oee/summary?tab=losses` regardless of flag (P1 interim home).
4. Given the task is closed out, when reviewers inspect evidence, then UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact + Playwright trace for one of the P2 placeholders per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.

## Test strategy
- RED: vitest oee-c-p2-tables + RTL coming-soon-page + flag branching asserting four ACs.
- Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test oee-c-p2-tables && pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run app/(oee)/_components/coming-soon-page`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not activate P2 rules — phase='P2', active=FALSE per PRD §7.2/7.3.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not skip feature-flag gating on P2 routes — translation note + §15.6 placeholder pattern.
- Do not name business column tenant_id; use org_id per Wave0 v4.3.
- Do not import @radix-ui/* outside packages/ui.

pipeline_inputs.description: P2 tables + rule stubs (active=FALSE) + shared ComingSoonPage placeholder + 4 P2 routes wired with feature-flag gating per §15.6.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Closes Auditor A OEE-003 (rule registry stubs) + part of OEE-004/006 (P2 surfaces visible behind flags). Anomaly + maintenance triggers remain inert (active=FALSE) so 15-c P2 build can flip flags + activate without schema changes. P2 routes render prototype-shaped content when flag is on; otherwise <P2Placeholder>.

Additional acceptance detail: UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact + Playwright trace for one P2 placeholder per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md.

Given /oee/anomalies with oee.anomaly_detection_enabled=false, when page renders, then <P2Placeholder> is shown; with flag true, the page renders per prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/oee/screens.jsx:950-995 (oee_anomaly_detection_page)
Given /oee/pareto is requested, when page renders, then <P2Placeholder> is shown with cross-link 'Go to Six Big Losses tab → /oee/summary?tab=losses' regardless of flag

Given the task is closed out, when reviewers inspect evidence, then UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact + Playwright trace for one of the P2 placeholders per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`
